quick_skim.title: Global strong solutions for 1D compressible Navier-Stokes/Cahn-Hilliard equations with vacuum
quick_skim.abstract: In this paper, we study the initial-boundary value problem of the 1D compressible Navier--Stokes/Cahn--Hilliard system with vacuum. We establish the global existence and uniqueness of strong solutions to this initial-boundary value problem. No any initial compatibility conditions are required via time weighted techniques, which leads to a loss of regularity near the initial time. Therefore, the uniqueness of solutions obtained in this paper is even more challenging. To address this issue, we establish refined growth estimates and singular-in-time weighted energy estimates that induce a Gronwall-type structure, which ultimately allows us to close the uniqueness proof in Eulerian coordinates without passing to Lagrangian coordinates.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: two-phase flow model with Navier-Stokes/Cahn-Hilliard equations
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proves global existence and uniqueness of strong solutions for a 1D compressible two-phase flow model with vacuum, supporting phase-field simulation validity.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对一维可压缩Navier-Stokes/Cahn-Hilliard系统含真空的初边值问题，通过时间加权技术避免了初始相容性条件，建立了整体强解的存在唯一性，为两相流相场模拟的适定性提供了严格证明。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对一维可压缩Navier-Stokes/Cahn-Hilliard系统含真空的初边值问题，通过时间加权技术避免了初始相容性条件，建立了整体强解的存在唯一性，为两相流相场模拟的适定性提供了严格证明。
